name: Cubicle Silk
description: Water-based speed lube that makes cubes faster and smoother. Evaporates over time and needs reapplication. Great for a quick speed boost on piece surfaces.

name: Cubicle DNM-37
description: Premium water-based lubricant and community favorite for speed. Makes cubes very fast and smooth. Widely considered the best water-based cube lube available.

name: Cubicle Lunar
description: Light silicone lube that provides a fast, papery, crispy feel. Much longer-lasting than water-based alternatives. Excellent on piece contact surfaces.

name: Cubicle Mystic
description: Medium-weight silicone lube that provides a smooth, creamy feel. Balances speed and control well. Good all-around lube for most cubers.

name: Cubicle Martian
description: Medium-weight silicone lube with a unique gummy and smooth feel. Slightly heavier than Mystic. Adds a controlled, tactile quality to turning.

name: Cubicle Stardust
description: Light silicone lube designed for a fast, airy, effortless feel. Similar weight to Lunar but with a different texture. Makes cubes feel lighter to turn.

name: Cubicle Weight 1
description: Lightest in the numbered weight series. Thin silicone oil for speeding up cubes. Best applied to piece tracks and contact surfaces for a fast, free-flowing feel.

name: Cubicle Weight 3
description: Medium weight silicone lube in the numbered series. Versatile option that works on both pieces and core. Provides a balanced, smooth feel without excessive slowdown.

name: Cubicle Weight 5
description: Heavy silicone lubricant for slowing down cubes and providing a gummy, controlled feel. Best applied to the core and springs. Longest lasting of the weight series.

name: SCS Cosmic Silk
description: SpeedCubeShop's water-based speed lube. Provides a fast, silky feel on piece surfaces. Evaporates over time like other water-based lubes. Great for a quick tune-up.

name: SCS Cosmic Speed
description: Light silicone lube from SpeedCubeShop for maximum speed. Long-lasting compared to water-based options. Applies to piece surfaces for a fast, smooth experience.

name: SCS Cosmic Compound X
description: Heavy compound lube from SpeedCubeShop designed for core and spring application. Slows down and stabilizes overly fast cubes. Provides a controlled, dampened feel.

name: Traxxas 10K Differential Oil
description: 10,000 cSt RC car differential oil. Lighter than the popular 50K variant. Good for slightly slowing a cube without making it too gummy. Applied to the core.

name: Traxxas 30K Differential Oil
description: 30,000 cSt RC car differential oil. Middle ground between 10K and 50K. Provides noticeable slowdown and a smooth, controlled core feel without being too thick.

name: Traxxas 50K Differential Oil
description: 50,000 cSt RC car differential silicone oil. The most popular non-cube-brand lube in the community. Applied to core and springs to significantly slow down and stabilize cubes.

name: Angstrom Dignitas
description: Premium piece lube from Angstrom Research. Designed specifically for cube piece contact surfaces. Provides an extremely smooth, fast, long-lasting feel.

name: Angstrom Gravitas
description: Premium core lube from Angstrom Research. Designed for core and spring application. Works in tandem with Dignitas for a complete premium lube setup.

name: GAN Magic Lube
description: GAN's own cube lubricant designed for their puzzles. Light silicone formula that works well on piece surfaces. Often included with premium GAN cube purchases.

name: GAN Standard Lube
description: GAN's standard cube lubricant. Medium viscosity silicone that provides a balanced feel. Included with some GAN cube packages for basic maintenance.

name: Lubicle Black
description: Heavy silicone-based lube designed for core application. Slows cubes down and eliminates spring noise. Provides a smooth, controlled, dampened feel.

name: Lubicle Speedy
description: Light silicone lube for piece surfaces. Designed to increase speed and provide a smooth, fast feel. Long-lasting formula that maintains performance over many solves.

name: Cubicle Weight 2
description: Light-medium silicone lube sitting between Weight 1 and Weight 3 in the numbered series. Provides slightly more control than Weight 1 while still keeping cubes fast. Great for piece surfaces when you want speed with a touch of smoothness.

name: Cubicle Weight 4
description: Medium-heavy silicone lube between Weight 3 and Weight 5 in the numbered series. Provides noticeable slowdown and a controlled, slightly gummy feel without being as thick as Weight 5. Works on both pieces and core.

name: Cubicle Nebula
description: Premium thick silicone lube from TheCubicle with a distinctly gummy, dense feel. Significantly slows cubes down and adds a heavy, tactile quality to every turn. Ideal for cubers who want maximum control and a plush, cushioned sensation.

name: SCS Cosmic Compound V
description: Medium weight compound lube from SpeedCubeShop. Sits between Cosmic Speed and Cosmic Compound X in thickness. Provides a balanced, smooth feel suitable for both pieces and core applications.

name: SCS Cosmic Lube
description: SpeedCubeShop's all-purpose silicone lubricant. A versatile, medium-weight lube that works well for general cube maintenance. Good entry point into the Cosmic lube lineup for beginners.

name: MoYu Lube
description: MoYu's official silicone cube lubricant. A straightforward medium-weight silicone lube designed to work well with MoYu puzzles. Affordable option that provides decent smoothness and longevity.

name: QiYi M2 Lube
description: QiYi's official cube lubricant. A medium-weight silicone formula designed for QiYi puzzles. Provides a smooth, balanced feel at an affordable price point. Good for routine maintenance.

description: SpeedCubeShop's premium piece lube engineered for maximum speed and a silky-smooth feel. Designed specifically for piece contact surfaces, delivering a fast, refined turning experience that lasts through many solves.

name: Cubicle Solar

name: XMD/QiYi Silicone Lube
